title: MrAuctionsBid
description: MrAuctionsBid is a comprehensive auction plugin that allows players to create and participate in item auctions with an intuitive BossBar interface.
body:
[❢] Supported Versions: 1.21.6, 1.21.7, 1.21.8
[❢] Requirements: Java 21, Vault

*Older versions are not and will not be supported*


## ✨ About the Plugin **MrAuctionsBid** is a comprehensive auction plugin that allows players to create and participate in item auctions with an intuitive **BossBar interface**. ## ✨ Functions - Interactive **BossBar auction interface** - **Vault economy** integration - Sound effects for auction events - Item **blacklist system** - Configurable **auction timers** - Automatic **bid extension system** ## ✨ Commands ### Player Commands - `/auctions create ` – Create an auction with the item in your hand - `/auctions bid ` – Place a bid on the current auction ### Admin Commands - `/auctions reload` – Reload configuration and message files - `/auctions blacklist add ` – Add item to blacklist - `/auctions blacklist remove ` – Remove item from blacklist - `/auctions blacklist list` – View blacklisted items ## ✨ Permissions ### Player Permissions - `mrauctionsbid.command.create` – Allows creating auctions - `mrauctionsbid.command.bid` – Allows bidding on auctions ### Admin Permissions - `mrauctionsbid.command.reload` – Allows reloading plugin configuration - `mrauctionsbid.command.blacklist` – Allows managing item blacklist This plugin is unique in that they can add a maximum of one auction at a time. ## ✨ Plugin Preview You can found preview images on Gallery
